arts.ttl: Tottenham send Man City warning over Destiny Udogie transfer interest
arts.sum: Tottenham take a strong stance on selling left-back Destiny Udogie to Man City.

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt v Tottenham: Europa League quarter-final, second leg – live
arts.sum: Europa League updates, 8pm BST kick-off (first leg: 1-1) Live scores | Football Daily | Get in touch! Email Michael Rarely has a quarter-final been so decisive for a team’s season, or a manager’s future. If Tottenham lose this game, and exit the Europa League, then their season is definitely over and it will almost certainly spell the end of Ange Postecoglou’s tenure. Spurs are 15th in the Premier League, and while they are not mathematically safe from relegation, there is nothing left to play for domestically, apart from pride. Managers in N17 have been booted out with a much better record than that. But win? Tottenham will be just three games from silverware and the promise of the Champions League. And should they qualify for Europe’s elite competition next season – with all the riches and prestige that that entails – then the season, and Ange’s job, will be saved. In a footballing world full of permutations and and and is a thrill (for the neutral, at least) for things to be so binary. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Spurs confirmed team vs Frankfurt - Tel in with Kulusevski and Spence on bench
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has named the Tottenham Hotspur team that will try to get past Eintracht Frankfurt in the £uropa League quarter-final second leg on Thursday night. With the full-backs, the Australian has named Destiny Udogie and Pedro Porro in the team with Djed Spence among the substitutes.

arts.ttl: Confirmed lineups: Eintracht Frankfurt vs. Tottenham
arts.sum: The lineups for Thursday's Europa League clash between Eintracht Frankfurt and Tottenham have been announced.

arts.ttl: Tottenham stars drop early team news hints for Eintracht Frankfurt Europa League clash
arts.sum: Spurs were beaten 4-2 by Wolves in the Premier League at the weekend, and now several players have offered hints of Postecoglou's potential team selection. Mathys Tel, Kevin Danso, Dominic Solanke, James Maddison and Pedro Porro all posted pre-match graphics on Instagram ahead of the quarter-final tie in Germany.

arts.ttl: Man United, Tottenham 'hold talks' to sign 6ft 6in goalkeeper after Europa League heroics
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur reportedly both make enquiries over a summer deal for a highly-rated Bundesliga goalkeeper.

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt vs Tottenham - Europa League: Live score, team news and updates as Ange Postecoglou's side look to keep season alive plus updates from Chelsea vs Legia Warsaw
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates from the Europa League clash between Eintracht Frankfurt and Tottenham plus updates from Chelsea vs Legia Warsaw.
